name: Phyllo Spinach Triangles
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Squeeze spinach dry with a clean towel.
Mix filling ingredients together in a bowl. Stack 6 phyllo sheets (thawed), cut lengthwise into 4 even pieces. Working with one strip at a time, dab 8 places with melted butter. Top with second strip. Lightly dab with melted butter.
Place 2 tablespoons spinach mixture at the short end of the strip. Fold one corner over the filling. Repeat folding down the length of the strip, forming a triangle. (Makes 12 total). Lightly dab the top of pastries with remaining melted butter.
Bake for about 15 minutes.
